Salam Alakoum
I am a single mother of 2 children and need help with my rent and bills.
I have been served an eviction notice due to late rent.
please help I'm in desperate need of support.

cases.description:
Assalymu Alaykum, due to my son’s ongoing health conditions I had to leave my job; two months ago. During this time my son has been frequently hospitalized. As a result of not being able to work and not being able to have an income my 3 children and I are now facing eviction. 

I would be immensely grateful for any assistance available. JazakAllah Khira.
cases.ai_summary: Parent unable to work due to child's health needs three children facing eviction.

cases.description:
As salamu alaikum :)
I am in need of 2 weeks advance rent if possible. 
I also am in need of a washing machine & dryer please.

I sent an application when I was still homeless with my son, but we have signed a lease and moved in now. 
We are just missing a few basic/ essentials needed for our new home.
I can send further documents such lease, bank statements etc
Thank you.
cases.ai_summary: Recently housed parent needs advance rent payment and basic household appliances urgently.

cases.description:
Dear brothers and sisters,
Alsalamu allikum,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request financial assistance through your support programs, as I am currently experiencing significant and ongoing financial hardship.

For the past two years, I have been struggling financially and have accumulated debts through loans from friends as well as services such as ZipPay and Afterpay. My financial situation worsened after I lost my job approximately one year ago, and I remained unemployed for about five months. Despite my efforts to recover and manage my obligations, I am still finding it very difficult to meet essential expenses.

I am currently preparing for my Pharmacy Board Intern Exam in Australia, which is a crucial step for me to become a registered pharmacist and secure stable employment. As part of this process, I am required to pay AUD 700 for the PSA exam. Unfortunately, I am unable to afford this fee due to my current financial situation.

This exam represents a very important turning point in my life. Successfully completing it will allow me to finally stand on solid ground, gain stable employment, and become financially independent.

I am a single woman living in Australia without family or support, and I am doing my best to improve my situation and build a secure future. I would be truly grateful if you could consider supporting me at this critical stage.

I am more than willing to provide any required evidence of exam registration and fees with Pharmaceutical Society of Australia.

Thank you very much for your time, understanding, and the meaningful support you provide to those in need.

Thank you very much,
Fatma Sharaf
cases.ai_summary: Individual experiencing ongoing financial hardship for two years requires general financial assistance.

cases.description:
I am writing to support an application for emergency relief on behalf of my client, Taybeh, a recently arrived refugee and single mother  of 4 children currently adjusting to life in Australia with her children.
Taybeh became the sole carer for her children following the passing of her husband in 2024. Since arriving in Australia, she has faced significant challenges settling into a new environment, including navigating unfamiliar systems, limited social supports, and ongoing financial hardship.
Taybeh is currently experiencing acute financial stress, with little to no income and difficulty meeting basic living expenses such as food, household needs, and essential bills. In an effort to improve her situation and become financially independent, she purchased a sewing machine with borrowed funds, hoping to generate income through sewing work. However, she has not yet been able to establish this income stream and is now in debt, which she is struggling to repay.
In addition to financial pressures, Taybeh is supporting her children through their own adjustment challenges, including health and wellbeing concerns that are currently being addressed with appropriate services.
Emergency relief is critical at this time to assist Taybeh in meeting her family’s immediate needs while she continues to settle and work towards stability. Without this support, the family remains at risk of ongoing financial hardship and difficulty maintaining basic living standards.

I strongly recommend that this application be considered favourably.
cases.ai_summary: Recently arrived refugee single mother with four children needs emergency relief assistance.

cases.description:
Assalamualaikum,
I am requesting Zakat assistance for my family. We are currently facing serious financial hardship. I have six children, and only my husband is working. Our expenses are very high, and we are struggling to meet basic needs.
 We urgently need support with:
- Food assistance
- Emergency financial relief
- Car repairs and registration renewal
- Replacement or repair of essential household items (washing machine, television)

Support with housing, as the owner has asked us to leave our current home

Our situation is very difficult, and we are doing our best to manage, but we cannot cope without help. Any Zakat or financial assistance you can provide would mean a lot to us.

Please let me know what documents you need from me.

JazakAllahu khairan,
Nurul
cases.ai_summary: Large family with single income facing serious hardship needs food and emergency support.

I'm assisting Saleheh in completing this application as she requested support(I'm her case manager from SSI), Saleheh is a single mother with three children (25-21-16)and looking after her elderly mother(77), the family arrived in Australia on 7/11/2026, and the English language is limitted and they are all except the elderly lady learning English now and they rely on Centrelink income and they are facing financial hardship due to multiple health appointment for Saleheg and his elderly mother, Hopefuly they can get some support from your sid,
Please let me know if you require further information
Munira Mitho
mmitho@ssi.org.au
0422337984
cases.ai_summary: Recently arrived single mother with three children and elderly parent needs language support.

cases.description:
I formally authorise Ms Rasa Aziz to act on my behalf and represent me in all matters relating to this application, as I am unable to communicate effectively in English and require assistance


I am an Afghan mother of four children currently living in a rental property. I have been residing in Australia for approximately two years. One of my children, aged 7, has a disability and requires additional care and support.

I am currently experiencing significant financial hardship across multiple areas of my life. I have limited English proficiency, as my primary languages are Dari and Pashto, which has made it very difficult for me to access services, secure stable support, and communicate effectively. I do not drive and do not have access to a vehicle, which further limits my ability to manage daily responsibilities and attend appointments.

At present, I am facing several urgent issues. My refrigerator has broken down, and I am unable to afford a replacement, which is impacting my ability to safely store food for my children. One of my daughters is unwell, and I have multiple upcoming medical expenses in early May. While some costs are partially covered by Medicare, I am still required to pay a significant amount out of pocket, which I cannot afford.

In addition, I am struggling to pay my electricity bills and urgently require pest control assistance, as my home is currently affected by a severe cockroach infestation. I am also unable to afford basic necessities such as groceries, clothing, and shoes for my children.

My rent is extremely high at $1,270 per fortnight, which places a significant financial burden on me. I have been actively trying to secure more suitable and affordable two-bedroom accommodation; however, my applications have been repeatedly declined due to having four children.

Overall, I am in a very difficult financial situation and am struggling to meet even the most basic needs for my family. I respectfully request urgent financial assistance and support services to help stabilise our living conditions and ensure the health, safety, and wellbeing of my children.
cases.ai_summary: Mother of four children requires assistance with rental property and general living expenses.

cases.description: Salam alaykom how are u? My rego will expire tomorrow and i need to drop off and pick up my daughter from school i would like to check if you can help me with this problem i can send u evidence of that thanks jazakom allah khayran
cases.ai_summary: Parent needs urgent vehicle registration payment to maintain school transport for daughter.

cases.description:
Salaam,
my name is Ahmed and i needed a one-off payment assistance. I recently lost my job and in rental arrears for almost a week. I'm actively looking for another job and already had couple of interviews. I live in brisbane and i'm married with kids. I've tried borrowing loans from different places as i know i'll be getting a job soon (2 interviews called back) and i dont want to pay haraam interest. I have been working since 20 and i'm 26 now and the cost of living and gas prices is putting strains on my marriage and personal life in general. I just needed help of $2000 jazakallah. I have tried everything and everywhere else while still looking for a job and my main concern is rental payment and food bills like kids milk and diapers. If you also need proof, i can provide rental emails and arrears. Let me know if you can help. Jazaakallah and have a good day.
cases.ai_summary: Recently unemployed married father in rental arrears needs urgent one-off payment assistance.

cases.description: migration lawyer fees
cases.ai_summary: Individual requires financial assistance specifically for migration lawyer fees and legal costs.

cases.description:
Dear Zakat Australia Team,
I hope this message finds you well.
I am writing to respectfully request urgent assistance due to my current difficult situation. I am currently experiencing severe financial hardship and do not have stable accommodation. At the moment, I am struggling to cover basic living expenses, including food and rent.
I have been doing my best to manage my situation, but unfortunately, my circumstances have become overwhelming, and I have no reliable support system to rely on. This has caused me significant stress and uncertainty about my immediate future.
I am seeking your support to help me through this challenging time, especially in securing temporary accommodation and meeting my essential daily needs. Any assistance you can provide would make a meaningful difference in my life and help me regain stability.
Thank you for taking the time to consider my request. I truly appreciate your compassion and support.
Kind regards,
cases.ai_summary: Person experiencing homelessness and severe financial hardship needs urgent accommodation and basic living assistance.

cases.description:
Hi team 

I am going through a separation and have been asked to leave the property i am currently at by my ex husband. We have a 7 year old son we share 70 me 30 him. This past week thankfully i was able to secure a rental, however i am in financial strain i have no family here i am on my own. My father is no help my mum has her own debts and bills. I have zero savings as ive used them for my bond, i am on centrelink payments and my sons father is not contributing with child support. I am looking for assistance with the startup moving costs ( moving truck which is approxinately $500 , food,  etc just for us to get on our feet for the first month please. I really appreciate the consideration.
cases.ai_summary: Separating mother with shared custody child secured rental but needs urgent financial assistance.

cases.description: Selam alleykum i am a single mother ive just been robbed broken enter .they have taken everything from my house i have nothing left l.ishallah if yous could pls help me kindly that would be great.also i am behind in rent.i have nothing left at mt house

cases.description:
AsalaamuAlaykum Warahmatullahi WaBarakaatu 
I had a vehicle accident recently and I was at fault. I do not have vehicle insurance however the other driver didn't want to make an insurance claim and register an accident on his vehicle. He was happy for me to pay for the repairs which totals $3570. I have other debts plus rent and fuel bills. I cannot pay this repair bill and would take me 3 years to save up that amount. Your help would really help me out of the this mushkilah. I  am willing to repay this debt if needed. My local masjid is Masjied Al Khalil Malaga Western Australia. My imam is Sheikh Abdul Qadir.
BarakAllahu feekum
cases.ai_summary: At-fault driver in vehicle accident needs assistance paying repair costs to other party.

ai_analysis.quality_summary: Priority assignment quality is extremely poor with multiple P1-level crises incorrectly assigned 'No Priority'. Critical cases including domestic violence, homelessness, evictions, and families with no food are not receiving appropriate urgent prioritization.

flags.reason: DV victim requiring immediate support should be same-day crisis priority
Single mother with children served eviction notice is immediate crisis requiring same-day response
Single mother with 3 children currently homeless is immediate crisis
Asylum seeker needing immediate accommodation assistance is same-day crisis
19-year-old currently homeless requiring immediate accommodation support
Single mother robbed of everything, behind in rent with children is immediate crisis
DV victim describing physical abuse, deprivation, and isolation requires immediate support
Single mother with 5 children seeking urgent help with food and basic needs
Client based overseas with debt issues does not constitute same-day crisis
Client with no food or money until next payment requires urgent assistance

patterns: Multiple P1-level crises (DV, homelessness, evictions) incorrectly assigned 'No Priority' status
Systematic failure to prioritize cases involving families with children in immediate danger
Cases clearly requiring same-day intervention not being flagged for urgent response
